caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Roatan Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan in the Western Caribbean is experiencing sustained winds near 20 knots with wave heights reaching 6.0 feet and an 8-second swell period from the east-northeast. Rain probability is at 100 percent, indicating persistent heavy rainfall impacting marine and port operations today.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Rough Seas Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained winds of 23 knots with wave heights reaching 10.4 feet and a dominant southwest swell period of 11 seconds. Rain probability is high at 95 percent, signaling significant wet conditions that will affect maritime and port operations throughout the day.
